en.text: Allah will keep good relations with him who keeps good relations with kith and kin

ar.text: حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدُ بْنُ مَخْلَدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ دِينَارٍ، عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ ‏ "‏ إِنَّ الرَّحِمَ سُجْنَةٌ مِنَ الرَّحْمَنِ، فَقَالَ اللَّهُ مَنْ وَصَلَكِ وَصَلْتُهُ، وَمَنْ قَطَعَكِ قَطَعْتُهُ ‏"‏‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton Ebu Hurejra: Pejgamberi (s.a.v.s.) ka thënë: "Lidhja farefisnore (Ar-Rahm) e ka marrë emrin nga i Gjithëmëshirshmi (Er-Rahman), dhe Allahu ka thënë: 'Unë do t’i mbaj lidhjet me atë që i mban lidhjet me ty, ndërsa do t’i shkëpus lidhjet me atë që i shkëput ato me ty.'"

en.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "The word 'Ar-Rahm (womb) derives its name from Ar-Rahman (i.e., one of the names of Allah) and Allah said: 'I will keep good relation with the one who will keep good relation with you, (womb i.e. Kith and Kin) and sever the relation with him who will sever the relation with you, (womb, i.e. Kith and Kin).
